case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA) N.A VS. NICHOLAS KNAPP ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1033 (B) (TRANSACTION ID # 200000164) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA) N.A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-23-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-24-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA) N.A AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, NICHOLAS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2019
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100039993) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA) N.A

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-23-2019 CONTINUED TO DEC-24-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA) N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNAPP, NICHOLAS $12,902.42 PRINCIPAL, $540.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,442.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200000164)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $540.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200000164) AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, NICHOLAS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200000164) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
